initial_entry.name: SANE - Smart AI Note Evolution
initial_entry.author: Adam Chen
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Evolve your notes intelligently with AI. When you add/edit notes, SANE finds the 3 most relevant notes and enhances them with smart tags, keywords, links, and summaries.
